title: pentacalia ochracea
intro: Pentacalia ochracea, also known as yellow pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for local communities. Herbal preparations of Pentacalia ochracea can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
